28: 
29: type TokenCache struct {
30: 	cache    map[string]cacheEntry
31: 	mu       sync.RWMutex
32: 	capacity int
33: 	ttl      time.Duration
34: }
35: 
36: type cacheEntry struct {
37: 	username  string
38: 	saName    string
39: 	namespace string
40: 	expiresAt time.Time
41: }
42: 
43: func NewTokenCache(capacity int, ttl time.Duration) *TokenCache {
44: 	return &TokenCache{
45: 		cache:    make(map[string]cacheEntry),
46: 		capacity: capacity,
47: 		ttl:      ttl,
48: 	}
49: }
50: 
51: func (tc *TokenCache) Get(key string) (username, saName, namespace string, ok bool) {
52: 	tc.mu.RLock()
53: 	defer tc.mu.RUnlock()
54: 
55: 	entry, exists := tc.cache[key]
56: 	if !exists || time.Now().After(entry.expiresAt) {
57: 		return "", "", "", false
58: 	}
59: 
60: 	return entry.username, entry.saName, entry.namespace, true
61: }
62: 
63: func (tc *TokenCache) Set(key, username, saName, namespace string) {
64: 	tc.mu.Lock()
65: 	defer tc.mu.Unlock()
66: 
67: 	if len(tc.cache) >= tc.capacity {
68: 		tc.evictExpired()
69: 	}
70: 
71: 	tc.cache[key] = cacheEntry{
72: 		username:  username,
73: 		saName:    saName,
74: 		namespace: namespace,
75: 		expiresAt: time.Now().Add(tc.ttl),
76: 	}
77: }
78: 
79: func (tc *TokenCache) evictExpired() {
80: 	now := time.Now()
81: 	for key, entry := range tc.cache {
82: 		if now.After(entry.expiresAt) {
83: 			delete(tc.cache, key)
84: 		}
85: 	}
86: }
87: 
88: func (tc *TokenCache) validateServiceAccountToken(ctx context.Context, clientset *kubernetes.Clientset, token, namespace string) (username, saName, ns string, err error) {
89: 	tokenReview := &authenticationv1.TokenReview{
90: 		Spec: authenticationv1.TokenReviewSpec{
91: 			Token: token,
92: 		},
93: 	}
94: 
95: 	result, err := clientset.AuthenticationV1().TokenReviews().Create(ctx, tokenReview, metav1.CreateOptions{})
96: 	if err != nil {
97: 		return "", "", "", err
98: 	}
99: 
100: 	if !result.Status.Authenticated {
101: 		return "", "", "", ErrUnauthorized
102: 	}
103: 
104: 	saName = result.Status.User.Username
105: 	if colonIdx := len("system:serviceaccount:"); len(saName) > colonIdx {
106: 		parts := saName[colonIdx:]
107: 		if slashIdx := indexRune(parts, ':'); slashIdx != -1 {
108: 			ns = parts[:slashIdx]
109: 			saName = parts[slashIdx+1:]
110: 		}
111: 	}
112: 
113: 	tc.Set(token, result.Status.User.Username, saName, namespace)
114: 
115: 	return result.Status.User.Username, saName, namespace, nil
116: }
117: 
118: func indexRune(s string, r rune) int {
119: 	for i, c := range s {
120: 		if c == r {
121: 			return i
122: 		}
123: 	}
124: 	return -1
125: }
126: 
127: var ErrUnauthorized = &unauthorizedError{}
128: 
129: type unauthorizedError struct{}
130: 
131: func (e *unauthorizedError) Error() string      { return "unauthorized" }
132: func (e *unauthorizedError) Unauthorized() bool { return true }

17: package picod
18: 
19: import (
20: 	"net/http"
21: 	"os"
22: 	"time"
23: 
24: 	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
25: )
26: 
27: const (
28: 	TimeoutExitCode       = 124
29: 	MaxBodySize           = 32 << 20
30: 	PublicKeyEnvVar       = "PICOD_AUTH_PUBLIC_KEY"
31: 	maxFileMode     int64 = 0o777
32: )
33: 
34: type Config struct {
35: 	Port      int
36: 	Workspace string
37: }
38: 
39: type Server struct {
40: 	engine       *gin.Engine
41: 	config       Config
42: 	authManager  *AuthManager
43: 	startTime    time.Time
44: 	workspaceDir string
45: }
46: 
47: func NewServer(config Config) (*Server, error) {
48: 	s := &Server{
49: 		config:    config,
50: 		startTime: time.Now(),
51: 		engine:    gin.New(),
52: 	}
53: 
54: 	s.authManager = &AuthManager{}
55: 	if err := s.authManager.LoadPublicKeyFromEnv(); err != nil {
56: 		return nil, err
57: 	}
58: 
59: 	if err := s.setWorkspace(config.Workspace); err != nil {
60: 		return nil, err
61: 	}
62: 
63: 	s.setupRoutes()
64: 
65: 	return s, nil
66: }
67: 
68: func (s *Server) setWorkspace(workspace string) error {
69: 	if workspace == "" {
70: 		workspace = "/workspace"
71: 	}
72: 
73: 	if _, err := os.Stat(workspace); os.IsNotExist(err) {
74: 		if err := os.MkdirAll(workspace, 0o755); err != nil {
75: 			return err
76: 		}
77: 	}
78: 
79: 	s.workspaceDir = workspace
80: 	return nil
81: }
82: 
83: func (s *Server) Run() error {
84: 	addr := ":" + itoa(s.config.Port)
85: 
86: 	server := &http.Server{
87: 		Addr:              addr,
88: 		Handler:           s.engine,
89: 		ReadHeaderTimeout: 10 * time.Second,
90: 	}
91: 
92: 	return server.ListenAndServe()
93: }
94: 
95: func (s *Server) setupRoutes() {
96: 	s.engine.Use(gin.Recovery())
97: 	s.engine.Use(gin.Logger())
98: 
99: 	if s.authManager.publicKey != nil {
100: 		s.engine.Use(s.authManager.AuthMiddleware())
101: 	}
102: 
103: 	api := s.engine.Group("/api")
104: 	{
105: 		api.POST("/execute", s.ExecuteHandler)
106: 		api.POST("/files", s.UploadFileHandler)
107: 		api.GET("/files", s.ListFilesHandler)
108: 		api.GET("/files/*path", s.DownloadFileHandler)
109: 	}
110: 
111: 	s.engine.GET("/health", s.HealthCheckHandler)
112: }
113: 
114: func (s *Server) HealthCheckHandler(c *gin.Context) {
115: 	c.JSON(http.StatusOK, gin.H{
116: 		"status":  "healthy",
117: 		"service": "picod",
118: 		"version": "0.1.0",
119: 		"uptime":  time.Since(s.startTime).String(),
120: 	})
121: }
122: 
123: func itoa(i int) string {
124: 	buf := make([]byte, 0, 10)
125: 	return string(appendInt(buf, i))
126: }
127: 
128: func appendInt(buf []byte, i int) []byte {
129: 	if i == 0 {
130: 		return append(buf, '0')
131: 	}
132: 	for i > 0 {
133: 		buf = append(buf, byte('0'+i%10))
134: 		i /= 10
135: 	}
136: 	for i, j := 0, len(buf)-1; i < j; i, j = i+1, j-1 {
137: 		buf[i], buf[j] = buf[j], buf[i]
138: 	}
139: 	return buf
140: }

17: package picod
18: 
19: import (
20: 	"crypto/rsa"
21: 	"crypto/x509"
22: 	"encoding/base64"
23: 	"encoding/pem"
24: 	"errors"
25: 	"fmt"
26: 	"io"
27: 	"net/http"
28: 	"os"
29: 	"sync"
30: 	"time"
31: 
32: 	"github.com/gin-gonic/gin"
33: 	"github.com/golang-jwt/jwt/v5"
34: )
35: 
36: type AuthManager struct {
37: 	publicKey *rsa.PublicKey
38: 	mu        sync.RWMutex
39: }
40: 
41: func (am *AuthManager) LoadPublicKeyFromEnv() error {
42: 	keyData := os.Getenv(PublicKeyEnvVar)
43: 	if keyData == "" {
44: 		return nil
45: 	}
46: 
47: 	decoded, err := base64.StdEncoding.DecodeString(keyData)
48: 	if err != nil {
49: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to decode public key: %w", err)
50: 	}
51: 
52: 	block, _ := pem.Decode(decoded)
53: 	if block == nil {
54: 		return errors.New("failed to parse PEM block")
55: 	}
56: 
57: 	pub, err := x509.ParsePKIXPublicKey(block.Bytes)
58: 	if err != nil {
59: 		return fmt.Errorf("failed to parse public key: %w", err)
60: 	}
61: 
62: 	rsaPub, ok := pub.(*rsa.PublicKey)
63: 	if !ok {
64: 		return errors.New("public key is not RSA")
65: 	}
66: 
67: 	am.mu.Lock()
68: 	am.publicKey = rsaPub
69: 	am.mu.Unlock()
70: 
71: 	return nil
72: }
73: 
74: func (am *AuthManager) AuthMiddleware() gin.HandlerFunc {
75: 	return func(c *gin.Context) {
76: 		am.mu.RLock()
77: 		hasKey := am.publicKey != nil
78: 		am.mu.RUnlock()
79: 
80: 		if !hasKey {
81: 			c.Next()
82: 			return
83: 		}
84: 
85: 		authHeader := c.GetHeader("Authorization")
86: 		if authHeader == "" {
87: 			c.AbortWithStatusJSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "missing authorization header"})
88: 			return
89: 		}
90: 
91: 		const bearerPrefix = "Bearer "
92: 		if len(authHeader) < len(bearerPrefix) || authHeader[:len(bearerPrefix)] != bearerPrefix {
93: 			c.AbortWithStatusJSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "invalid authorization format"})
94: 			return
95: 		}
96: 
97: 		tokenString := authHeader[len(bearerPrefix):]
98: 
99: 		token, err := jwt.Parse(tokenString, func(token *jwt.Token) (interface{}, error) {
100: 			if _, ok := token.Method.(*jwt.SigningMethodRSA); !ok {
101: 				return nil, fmt.Errorf("unexpected signing method: %v", token.Header["alg"])
102: 			}
103: 			am.mu.RLock()
104: 			defer am.mu.RUnlock()
105: 			return am.publicKey, nil
106: 		})
107: 
108: 		if err != nil || !token.Valid {
109: 			c.AbortWithStatusJSON(http.StatusUnauthorized, gin.H{"error": "invalid token"})
110: 			return
111: 		}
112: 
113: 		c.Request.Body = io.NopCloser(http.MaxBytesReader(c.Writer, c.Request.Body, MaxBodySize))
114: 		c.Next()
115: 	}
116: }

3:

6: You may obtain a copy of the License at

12: WITHOUT WARRANTIES OR CONDITIONS OF ANY KIND, either express or implied.
13: See the License for the specific language governing permissions and
14: limitations under the License.
15: */
16: 
17: package store
18: 
19: import (
20: 	"context"
21: 	"encoding/json"
22: 	"fmt"
23: 	"os"
24: 	"time"
25: 
26: 	"github.com/volcano-sh/agentcube/pkg/common/types"
27: 
28: 	redisv9 "github.com/go-redis/redis/v9"
29: )
30: 
31: const (
32: 	sessionPrefix        = "session:"
33: 	expiryIndexKey       = "session:expiry"
34: 	lastActivityIndexKey = "session:last_activity"
35: )
36: 
37: type redisStore struct {
38: 	cli                  *redisv9.Client
39: 	sessionPrefix        string
40: 	expiryIndexKey       string
41: 	lastActivityIndexKey string
42: }
43: 
44: func newRedisStore() (Store, error) {
45: 	addr := os.Getenv("REDIS_ADDR")
46: 	if addr == "" {
47: 		addr = "localhost:6379"
48: 	}
49: 
50: 	password := ""
51: 	passwordRequired := os.Getenv("REDIS_PASSWORD_REQUIRED")
52: 	if passwordRequired == "true" || passwordRequired == "" {
53: 		password = os.Getenv("REDIS_PASSWORD")
54: 	}
55: 
56: 	opts, err := makeRedisOptions()
57: 	if err != nil {
58: 		return nil, err
59: 	}
60: 
61: 	if addr != "" {
62: 		opts.Addr = addr
63: 	}
64: 	if password != "" {
65: 		opts.Password = password
66: 	}
67: 
68: 	cli := redisv9.NewClient(opts)
69: 
70: 	return &redisStore{
71: 		cli:                  cli,
72: 		sessionPrefix:        sessionPrefix,
73: 		expiryIndexKey:       expiryIndexKey,
74: 		lastActivityIndexKey: lastActivityIndexKey,
75: 	}, nil
76: }
77: 
78: func makeRedisOptions() (*redisv9.Options, error) {
79: 	return &redisv9.Options{
80: 		DB:       0,
81: 		Protocol: 2,
82: 	}, nil
83: }
84: 
85: func (r *redisStore) Ping(ctx context.Context) error {
86: 	pong, err := r.cli.Ping(ctx).Result()
87: 	if err != nil {
88: 		return err
89: 	}
90: 	if pong != "PONG" {
91: 		return fmt.Errorf("unexpected ping response: %s", pong)
92: 	}
93: 	return nil
94: }
95: 
96: func (r *redisStore) GetSandboxBySessionID(ctx context.Context, sessionID string) (*types.SandboxInfo, error) {
97: 	key := r.sessionPrefix + sessionID
98: 	data, err := r.cli.Get(ctx, key).Bytes()
99: 	if err == redisv9.Nil {
100: 		return nil, ErrNotFound
101: 	}
102: 	if err != nil {
103: 		return nil, err
104: 	}
105: 
106: 	var sandbox types.SandboxInfo
107: 	if err := json.Unmarshal(data, &sandbox); err != nil {
108: 		return nil, err
109: 	}
110: 
111: 	return &sandbox, nil
112: }
113: 
114: func (r *redisStore) StoreSandbox(ctx context.Context, sandbox *types.SandboxInfo) error {
115: 	key := r.sessionPrefix + sandbox.SessionID
116: 
117: 	data, err := json.Marshal(sandbox)
118: 	if err != nil {
119: 		return err
120: 	}
121: 
122: 	expiresAt := sandbox.ExpiresAt
123: 	if expiresAt.IsZero() {
124: 		expiresAt = time.Now().Add(8 * time.Hour)
125: 	}
126: 
127: 	ttl := time.Until(expiresAt)
128: 	if ttl <= 0 {
129: 		ttl = 8 * time.Hour
130: 	}
131: 
132: 	pipe := r.cli.Pipeline()
133: 
134: 	setCmd := pipe.SetNX(ctx, key, data, ttl)
135: 
136: 	expiryScore := float64(expiresAt.Unix())
137: 	pipe.ZAdd(ctx, r.expiryIndexKey, redisv9.Z{
138: 		Score:  expiryScore,
139: 		Member: sandbox.SessionID,
140: 	})
141: 
142: 	lastActivity := sandbox.CreatedAt
143: 	if sandbox.LastActivity != nil {
144: 		lastActivity = *sandbox.LastActivity
145: 	}
146: 	pipe.ZAdd(ctx, r.lastActivityIndexKey, redisv9.Z{
147: 		Score:  float64(lastActivity.Unix()),
148: 		Member: sandbox.SessionID,
149: 	})
150: 
151: 	_, err = pipe.Exec(ctx)
152: 	if err != nil {
153: 		return err
154: 	}
155: 
156: 	if !setCmd.Val() {

package picod

import "time"

type ExecuteRequest struct {
	Command    []string          `json:"command"`
	Timeout    string            `json:"timeout,omitempty"`
	WorkingDir string            `json:"workingDir,omitempty"`
	Env        map[string]string `json:"env,omitempty"`
}

type ExecuteResponse struct {
	Stdout    string  `json:"stdout"`
	Stderr    string  `json:"stderr"`
	ExitCode  int     `json:"exitCode"`
	Duration  float64 `json:"duration"`
	StartTime string  `json:"startTime"`
	EndTime   string  `json:"endTime"`
}

type FileInfo struct {
	Path     string    `json:"path"`
	Size     int64     `json:"size"`
	Mode     string    `json:"mode"`
	Modified time.Time `json:"modified"`
}

type UploadFileRequest struct {
	Path    string `json:"path"`
	Content string `json:"content"`
	Mode    string `json:"mode,omitempty"`
}

type FileEntry struct {
	Name    string `json:"name"`
	Size    int64  `json:"size"`
	Modified string `json:"modified"`
	Mode    string `json:"mode"`
	IsDir   bool   `json:"isDir"`
}

type ListFilesResponse struct {
	Files []FileEntry `json:"files"`
}
